title: poa rubra
intro: Poa rubra, also known as Red Fescue or Red Meadow Grass, is a species of grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic qualities. The health benefits of Poa rubra include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
